message: Morning team! Feeling pumped for the big ?Hipster Haul? event this week?
Absolutely! Can't wait to see all our hard work pay off.
Agreed, it's going to be a game-changer for us
Customer support team standing by to handle any queries. Let's do this!
Team, the excitement is palpable! I have full confidence in each of you to make this event a roaring success.
Let's showcase our best and leave our customers thrilled with what we have to offer. Together, we'll make it happen!
Absolutely, Bez! And let's not forget the potential revenue boost this event could bring. Our projections are looking promising.
:moneybag: :moneybag: :moneybag:
Fingers crossed everything goes smoothly this time! :crossed_fingers: :joy:

Welcome to Details Matter, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

? *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 ? *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
Speaking of celebrations, any recommendations for a post-event holiday destination? I could use some time off after this!
How about a tropical paradise with no Wi-Fi? :desert_island:
Hey folks, hate to rain on the parade, but I've got some new reports coming in about customers encountering issues with the products on the website.
Yeah, Bob, anything specific you're noticing? Error messages, affected payment methods?
Customers are not able to place orders
Alright team, let's get to work. Tinus, you can start planning that holiday once we've got this sorted!.
Deal! But first, let's get to the bottom of this issue
Hey team, just dropping in to emphasise the urgency of resolving this issue swiftly. We've got a major event on the horizon - the launch of our exclusive "Hipster Haul Weekend" next week.
It's poised to be our biggest sale yet, and any delays caused by this payment glitch could seriously impact our preparations.
Let's prioritise frequent updates and keep the communication channels wide open.
We have a lot of recent changes made to the platform so im going to compile a list with the changes and the descriptions.
Will send it over soon
@bob How many customers have reported issues so far and are they from any specific region?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
from what i can tell most of the reports seems to be coming from the two regions
My team has gathered the customer reports as of the last 3 hours to make it easier to understand
Perhaps its similar to our incident in Frankfurt with the network being down for that region?
*Incident Number INC100089:* Sev-2 Customers unable to place orders on website
what is the impact on this issue?
@tanya Are there any changes to the platform that you are aware of that would effect customers in those regions?
:star: Check changes done to the platform

https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/YjZjNWFhYjFlZmQ0NDBmOWFlZDNlY2VjNDUxNzc4NjA

sure i will look into that now

they arent too frequent but as time went on they have become more frequent

:star: Reviewed changes
Sure thing, what regions is this impacting and what issue are we facing? this info will help with my investigation
@hamed Could this be caused by the API key change?
sorry i havent been keeping up with the chat, whats going on?
@maya from the information that @bob has shared, this appears to be affecting customers in Turkey and Japan more than others.
:star: Qualify the problem
i see, so people from that region cant place orders, i will look into this now
@hamed Customers have reported being unable to place orders
:star: Escalating when required
are you able to reporduce the issue?

at what point do they see the issue, have we a good understanding of what the issue is?
and what do the logs say?
@maya I have been unable to reproduce the issue
:star: Attempt to replicate the issue
let me give it a try, i have a vpn
so far nothing is coming up from the security scans
i can load the site fine with a vpn on that location
Oh i think i found the issue, when i swap to their local currency i am mmet with an error
@bez Some customers have reported being unable to place orders on the website, we are checking to see how widespread the issue is.
Graham can you do the same without the VPN and see  if youre having any issues

i just checked and i am seeing orders coming from that region, seems they can pay with dollars and poiunds

@maya I have been able to reproduce the issue by changing the currency:
HTTP Status: 500 Internal Server Error

Error Message: rpc error: code = Unavailable desc = connection error: desc = "transport: Error while dialing: dial tcp 172.20.164.247:7000: connect: connection refused" failed to fetch necessary data for processing

Function: main.(*dataProcessor).fetchData

File: /src/data_processor.go:124

We apologize for the inconvenience. Our system encountered an unexpected issue while attempting to retrieve essential data. Our team is actively investigating the problem. Please try your request again later.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact support.
:star: Reproduces the incident
thats what i see aswell
this doesnt seem like a security issue at all then
@maya and @tanya Could you investigate why the connections are being refused?
:star: Form an effective investigation team
i will check with the network team
@bez This is only affecting customers from Turkey and Japan, which is 9% of our customers.
i see hamed suggested we look into the logs, did you miss that message Graham?
@daniel and @shay Could those errors be caused by software deployments?
i will take a look into this now

no issues when it comes to the network connections
no new software update would impact like this
could this be related to the currency changes?
have we looked into the api's?

if there was an issue im sure they would have shown up long ago

"failed to charge card: could not charge the card: rpc error: code = Code(400) desc = Sorry, we cannot process visa_electron credit cards. Only VISA or MasterCard is accepted.
:star: Facts over opinion

i see this error 
ERROR: Authentication failed for currency exchange rate service. ERROR CODE: 401 Unauthorized

its an independant change and has no dependencies
@daniel
i dont think checkout will be the issue
if it was, all users should see this issue
it seems like its local to them 2 currencies
Rechecking the currency healthy and changes may be the best move, what do you think graham?
how is the investigation going?
are we close to a resolution?

:star: Ask team members to provide evidence of their assertions

seems to point in that direction
seems the currency exchange service is having issues operationg correctly

cart service would use currency service to see the price of items
if tanya is right this this may be why chckout is seeing issues (due to an issue in currency service)

@bez We are just confirm the best option for restoring the service.
